name: Radiance
description: Gain additional [energy:1] for the next [blue]2[/blue] turns.
description_raw: Gain additional {Energy:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:next turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Rage
description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Rampart
description: At the start of the player's turn, Turret Operator gains [blue]25[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Ravenous
description: When an enemy dies, Corpse Slug immediately eats it, becoming [gold]Stunned[/gold] and gaining [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Reaper Form
description: Whenever Attacks deal damage, apply [blue]2[/blue] times that much [gold]Doom[/gold].
description_raw: Whenever Attacks deal damage, apply {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] times }that much [gold]Doom[/gold].

name: Reattach
description: If other segments are still alive, revives in [blue]2[/blue] turns with [blue]25[/blue] HP.

name: Rebound
description: The next [blue]2[/blue] cards you play this turn are placed on the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
description_raw: The next {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play this turn {Amount:plural:is|are} placed on the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Reflect
description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker.

name: Regen
description: [gold]Regen[/gold] heals HP at the end of your turn. Each turn, [gold]Regen[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].

name: Temporary Strength
description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Retain Hand
description: [gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the next [blue]2[/blue] turns.
description_raw: [gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] {Amount:plural:this turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Ringing
description: You can only play [blue]1[/blue] card this turn.

name: Ritual
description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at the end of your turn.

name: Rolling Boulder
description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue][Amount][/blue] damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by [blue]5[/blue].
description_raw: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by [blue]{Damage}[/blue].

name: Royalties
description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]25[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

name: Rupture
description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Sandpit
description: In [blue]2[/blue] turns, you will be eaten and die.
description_raw: {Amount:plural:When [gold]The Insatiable[/gold] takes its turn|In [blue]{}[/blue] turns}, you will be eaten and die.

name: Seeking Edge
description: [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits ALL enemies.

name: Self-Forming Clay
description: Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.

name: Sentry Mode
description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sweeping Gaze[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Serpent Form
description: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]4[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

name: Temporary Strength
description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Temporary Strength Down
description: Lose [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Shadow Step
description: For the next [blue]2[/blue] turns after this one, Attacks deal double damage.
description_raw: {Amount:plural:Next turn|For the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns after this one}, Attacks deal double damage.

name: Shadowmeld
description: Double your [gold]Block[/gold] gain this turn [blue]2[/blue] times.
description_raw: Double your [gold]Block[/gold] gain this turn{Amount:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.

name: Shriek
description: The first time [gold]this creature's[/gold] HP reaches [blue][Amount][/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].

name: Shrink
description: [gold]This creature's[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage.
description_raw: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:While {} is alive, your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} Attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage{Amount:cond:==1? next turn|>1? for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns|}.

name: Shroud
description: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Sic 'Em
description: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].

name: Signal Boost
description: Your next [blue]2[/blue] Powers are played an extra time.
description_raw: Your next {Amount:plural:Power is|[blue]{}[/blue] Powers are} played an extra time.

name: Skittish
description: The first time [gold]this creature[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
description_raw: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Sleight of Flesh
description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]13[/blue] damage.

name: Slippery
description: The next [blue]2[/blue] times [gold]this creature[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
description_raw: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.

name: Sloth
description: You cannot play more than [blue]3[/blue] cards each turn.

name: Slow
description: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.

name: Slumber
description: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP 3 times.

name: Smoggy
description: You can only play [blue]1[/blue] Skill per turn.

name: Smokestack
description: Whenever you create a Status, deal damage to ALL enemies.

name: Sneaky
description: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Soar
description: Receives [blue]50%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.
description_raw: Receives [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less attack damage until it lands.

name: Spectrum Shift
description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Temporary Dexterity
description: Gain [gold]Dexterity[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Speedster
description: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

name: Spinner
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Glass[/gold].

name: Spirit of Ash
description: Whenever you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Stampede
description: At the end of your turn, [blue]1[/blue] random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is played against a random enemy.

name: Star Next Turn
description: Gain 1 [star:1] next turn.
description_raw: Gain 1 {singleStarIcon} next turn.

name: Steam Eruption
description: When killed, deals damage at the end of your next turn.

name: Stock
description: When killed, a new Axebot is summoned in its place.

name: Storm
description: Whenever you play a Power, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].

name: Strangle
description: Whenever you play a card this turn, this enemy loses [blue]2[/blue] HP.

name: Stratagem
description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]1[/blue] card from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Strength
description: Increases attack damage by [blue][/blue].
description_raw: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} attack damage by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue].

name: Subroutine
description: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]1[/blue] [energy:1].
description_raw: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

name: Suck
description: Whenever [gold]this creature[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_raw: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals unblocked attack damage, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Summon Next Turn
description: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].

name: Surprise
description: Something is off about this creature...

name: Surrounded
description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

name: Swipe
description: Upon killing this enemy, the stolen card is returned.

name: Sword Sage
description: [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].

name: Temporary Focus
description: Gain [gold]Focus[/gold] until the end of this turn.

name: Tag Team
description: The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.

name: Tainted
description: Take [blue][Amount][/blue] additional damage from Attacks this turn.
description_raw: Take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage from Attacks this turn.

name: Tangled
description: Attacks cost an additional [energy:1] for 2 turns.
description_raw: Attacks cost an additional {Amount:energyIcons()} {Amount:plural:this turn|for {} turns}.

name: Tank
description: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.

name: Tender
description: Whenever you play a card, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.

name: Territorial
description: At the end of [gold]this creature's[/gold] turn, it gains [blue][Amount][/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
description_raw: At the end of [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: The Bomb
description: At the end of [blue]3[/blue] turns, deal [blue]40[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
description_raw: At the end of {Amount:plural:this turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

name: The Gambit
description: If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.

name: The Hunt
description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional card reward at the end of combat.

name: The Sealed Throne
description: Whenever you play a card, gain [star:1].
description_raw: Whenever you play a card, gain {Amount:starIcons()}.

name: Thievery
description: Steals [gold]Gold[/gold] when Attacking.

name: Thorns
description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.

name: Thunder
description: Whenever you [gold]Evoke Lightning[/gold], deal [blue]8[/blue] damage to each enemy hit.

name: Tools of the Trade
description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and discard [blue]1[/blue] card.

name: Toric Toughness
description: Gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of the next [blue]2[/blue] turns.
description_raw: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Tracking
description: [gold]Weak[/gold] enemies take [blue]2[/blue] times more damage from Attacks.

name: Trash to Treasure
description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random Orbs.
description_raw: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] random Orb|[blue]{}[/blue] random Orbs}.

name: Tyranny
description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
description_raw: At the start of your turn, draw {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Amount:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Unmovable
description: The first [blue]2[/blue] times you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
description_raw: The first {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.

name: Veilpiercer
description: The next [gold]Ethereal card[/gold] you play costs [blue]0[/blue].

name: Vicious
description: Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

name: Vigor
description: [gold]This creature's[/gold] next Attack deals [blue][Amount][/blue] additional damage.
description_raw: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.

name: Vital Spark
description: ALL [gold]Skills[/gold] are [gold]Tainted[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].

name: Void Form
description: The first [blue]2[/blue] cards you play each turn are free to play.
description_raw: The first {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play each turn {Amount:plural:is|are} free to play.

name: Vulnerable
description: Receive [blue]50%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue][Amount][/blue] turns.
description_raw: Receive [blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Waste Away
description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] less [gold]Energy[/gold] per turn.

name: Weak
description: Weakened creatures deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage with Attacks.

name: Well-Laid Plans
description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to [blue]1[/blue] card.

name: Withering Presence
description: Every [blue]6[/blue] cards you play, add a [gold]Wither[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Wraith Form
description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
